faq.description: Do you have any questions? We have got you covered.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

refundPolicy.question: What is the refund policy?
refundPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not happy with our product.

cancelSubscription.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
cancelSubscription.answer: You can cancel your subscription by visiting the billing page.

changePlan.question: Can I change my plan?
changePlan.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time by visiting the billing page.

freeTrial.question: Do you offer a free trial?
freeTrial.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial.
